title: Selection
description: An approach-routing decision recorded by the select capability (agency/capabilities/select/_main.py; Spec 296 / Spec 301). SERVES the active intent; the approach archetype determines how the operation is executed.

operation.description: Natural-language description of the operation being routed (e.g. 'rename symbol Foo across repo').

approach.description: Selected archetype: 'semantic' (structure-aware), 'pattern' (fast bulk), or 'native' (built-in safe default).
